lines: Mutabaz' ubuntu bwawe Ni jyew' ubukwiriye. Burakiz' abandi cyane; None, nanjye bunzemo.Bunzemo, bunzemo. None, nanjye bunzemo.
Data mwiza, Mana yera,Mpora ngucumuraho. Mfit' ibyaha byinshi cyane,
Ntumpiteho, Yesu wanjye;Nkwisunge, nkwiragize ! Mfit' inzara, mfit' inyota,
Mwuka Wer’ ump' umutimaWizey' Umucunguzi; Yes' unyuhagir' ibyaha Mu
maraso wavuye.Mboneza, mboneza Mu maraso wavuye.
Mwuka Wera, jye nd' impumyi;Ndakwinginz’ umpumure. Ujy' uhamy’ iby'Umukiza;
Non' umumpishurire.Nd' impumyi, nd' impumyi! Non' umumpishurire
Urukundo rwawe, Yesu, Ruva ku musaraba, Urunyerek' ub' unkize ; Noneh'
